final:
module top_module(input clk, reset, data, output reg [2:0] q);// Change reg q to reg [2:0] q

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 3'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[1:0], data}; // Shift operation is now valid
        end
    end

endmodule
